title: Encephalocarpus strobiliformis

intro: Encephalocarpus strobiliformis, also known as the Strobilus plant, is a type of flowering plant in the family Euphorbiaceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health. Bioactive constituents of Encephalocarpus strobiliformis include triterpenoids, flavonoids, and alkaloids, which have been shown to possess antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial activities. The most common herbal preparations made with Encephalocarpus strobiliformis include extracts and tinctures, which are often used to support cardiovascular health and immune function.
